goal: Map existing OpenFang API routes to example-app data needs and surface any mismatches to the coordinator.
constraints: This agent does NOT edit app/, components/, or lib/ without coordinator approval
Each contract doc must specify: HTTP method, path, request schema, response schema, error codes
Every mismatch between contracts-lock decision and live endpoint behavior must be logged under 'mismatches' in the doc
Do not change the live endpoint behavior — only document it
done_criteria: docs/contracts/chat.md exists: documents POST /api/agents/{id}/message request + SSE event schema
docs/contracts/history.md exists: documents GET /api/agents/{id}/history response shape with all item fields
docs/contracts/health.md exists: documents GET /api/health response shape, maps to four status values in contracts-lock
docs/contracts/connect.md exists: documents GET /api/channels response shape and per-channel fields
Each doc has a 'mismatches' section (may be empty if no mismatches found)
Any blocking mismatch has been escalated to coordinator via a Blocked message before task is marked Done
escalation_rules: Escalate immediately if /api/agents/{id}/history does not exist or returns 404
Escalate immediately if SSE stream does not emit 'event: delta' lines matching contracts-lock schema
Escalate if /api/health response fields do not map cleanly to connected/degraded/offline/unknown
